calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-15-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:53am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Sabrina L. Carter appears in Pro Per, appellant Yulu Shtarkman, dba Discount Auto Sales. Also appearing are Hilda Shtarkman, wife of appellant Yulu Shtarkman; and Hooman Khalili, a bank representative appears. Parties present their respective cases in the narrative. Parties and witnesses were previously sworn, and testify in the narrtive. Hooman Khalili, from appellant's finance company, testifies in the narrative and responds to Judge Grotch's direct questions. Mr. and Ms. Shtarkman also testify in the narrative. Ms. Carter testifies in the narrative.
11:37am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or admitted. Judge Pro Tem Grotch retains the file.
